content:
- Completed task 36 execution phase: hardened `tests/policy_e2e_api_only.rs`, removed over-broad `post_switchover(` ban, added missing forbidden internal steering tokens, improved diagnostics, and added explicit allowed-action guard assertions.
- Added post-start policy comments in `src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs` around API control/observation and external failure-stimulus helpers.
- Updated task markdown to verified plan -> NOW EXECUTE -> completed status with all acceptance boxes checked and `<passing>true</passing>` set.
- Ran gates with low-flake settings and captured logs under `.ralph/evidence/story-rust-system-harness/36-task-enforce-post-startup-hands-off-test-policy-no-direct-coordination/gates`: `cargo test --test policy_e2e_api_only`, `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint` all passed.
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh` as required and added a new AGENTS learning: policy guards should ban precise forbidden coordination tokens and explicitly keep allowed switchover/SQL actions unblocked.
- Next if resuming: verify branch is clean after commit/push and hand off to next task selected by Ralph.
